eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Shoshone, ID; at 4:08 PM on JUN 16, 2026 Effective until 10:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: There is an active evacuation in progress for the entire Big Creek and Elizabeth Park Area. Please safely evacuate all persons and pets at this time. There is an active fire in the area.
